reviews.comment:
Fin de semana largo y había un solo playero atendiendo. 50 minutos de demora con solo 7 autos adelante. Por suerte de regreso encontré una buena YPF en catriel

(Translated by Google)
Long weekend, and there was only one beach attendant serving. A 50-minute delay with only seven cars ahead. Luckily, on the way back, I found a good YPF in Catriel.

reviewReply.comment: Martin Buen dia tuvimos demora en el despacho, estamos trabajando para que la demora sea la menor posible

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Very good gas station, clean bathrooms, super friendly staff, and a very good hot shower. On March 19, 2024, I paid 1,000 pesos.

If you are sleeping in your car or motorhome, I advise staying as far away from the pumps as possible due to the noise.

(Original)
Posto muito bom, banheiros limpo funcionário super simpáticos e um banho quente muito bom dia 19/03/2024 paguei 1.000 pesos.
Se for dormir no carro ou motorhome aconselho ficar o mais longe possível das bombas devido o barulho.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario. Esperamos su pronta visita

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y servicio baños limpios y lindo parque para descansar y estirar las piernas se puede apreciar el río que corre al lado muy linda ypf

(Translated by Google)
Good service and attention, clean restrooms, and a lovely park to relax and stretch your legs. You can appreciate the river that runs alongside it. Very nice YPF station.
